CHART 490
In this chart as Jupiter is in Aries with Saturn and the Moon, the native
will be a priest, disseminating knowledge of truth.
Saturn frrst contacts Venus in Gemini and next Mercury in Cancer
(Mind). Mars is placed in Leo with the Sun. As Mars has Mercury behind him
and contacts next Saturn in Aries, the native cannot have marital happiness
